name: Calculate Photometric Zero Point
description: Determine the photometric zero point of the V-band image of Messier 12 (~/AstroImages/zero_point/M12_V.fits) using the reference stars listed in ~/AstroImages/zero_point/standard_stars.txt. Perform aperture photometry on the five stars using an aperture radius of 15, an inner background annulus of 20, and an outer background annulus of 30. Calculate the average zero point (ZP) using the formula ZP = V_standard + 2.5 * log10(Source_Sky). Save the resulting measurements table to ~/AstroImages/zero_point/measurements.xls and a report containing the final average ZP value to ~/AstroImages/zero_point/zp_report.txt.
